name: management-world-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at 《管理世界》, the top management / applied-economics journal in China.

plugins.name: management-world-skills
plugins.description: Eleven-skill bundle covering the 《管理世界》 manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, China-context topic selection, literature review, identification, institutional background, mechanism / heterogeneity, tables and figures, policy implications, submission preflight, R&R rebuttal, and post-acceptance data-and-code replication package.
